# Baselyne Systems

> AI infrastructure, data engineering, and MLOps consulting. We help teams move AI from experimentation into production.

## About

Baselyne Systems is a founder-led consulting firm focused on AI infrastructure, data engineering, and MLOps. We bring large-scale engineering experience from Meta and Alphabet to companies building production AI systems.

## Services

### Data Infrastructure
Modern data platforms for AI workloads: lakehouse architecture, real-time and batch pipelines, data governance, semantic data layers, and vector search infrastructure for RAG.
URL: https://baselynesystems.com/services/data-infrastructure-consulting

### MLOps
Get AI from prototype to production: model and prompt versioning, deployment infrastructure, evaluation and monitoring, ML pipeline orchestration, and continuous improvement workflows.
URL: https://baselynesystems.com/services/mlops-consulting

### AI Infrastructure
Scalable AI compute with cost control: GPU orchestration, cost attribution, LLM serving infrastructure, security and compliance, and AI observability.
URL: https://baselynesystems.com/services/ai-infrastructure-consulting

## Founder

Achyuth Samudrala - Nearly a decade of infrastructure engineering experience, including six years at Meta and Alphabet. Built petabyte-scale data platforms and systems handling 100M+ queries per second.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/achyuthsamudrala/

## Contact

Schedule a 30-minute call to discuss your infrastructure challenges.
Calendly: https://calendly.com/achyuthsamudrala/30min
Website: https://baselynesystems.com/contact

## Blog

Technical case studies on open-source infrastructure built by Baselyne.

### Bulkhead: Defense in Depth for Autonomous AI Agents (March 2026)
Four independent enforcement layers for AI agent governance: compiled guardrails evaluated in 184ns, kernel-level iptables egress, append-only audit trail, and non-blocking human-in-the-loop escalation. Built with Go 1.24, Rust 1.83, PostgreSQL 16, gRPC.
URL: https://baselynesystems.com/blog/bulkhead
GitHub: https://github.com/achyuthnsamudrala/bulkhead

### Retrieval OS: A Production-Grade Retrieval Runtime (February 2026)
Config versioning, staged rollouts, automatic quality guard-rails, and 2.8ms rollback propagation for RAG systems. 10,785 QPS on a single node with 81.4% natural cache hit rate. Built with FastAPI, Redis, Qdrant, PostgreSQL.
URL: https://baselynesystems.com/blog/retrieval-os
GitHub: https://github.com/Baselyne-Systems/retrieval-os

### Building a High-Throughput CDC Platform (February 2026)
Modular Python CDC platform achieving 38,647 msg/s with config-driven tuning, exactly-once delivery, multi-source support, and Apache Iceberg lakehouse with time travel.
URL: https://baselynesystems.com/blog/cdc-platform
GitHub: https://github.com/Baselyne-Systems/cdc-platform
